title: DeathKick
description: Kick on Death – This plugin automatically kicks players when they die, similar to Unstable Universe
body:
![# 🏷️ Kick on Death ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad4e117cb11f4ab5a2a2fcc88423bb133c0c1cfa.png)

**Kick on Death** is a lightweight mod designed for Minecraft servers that want to keep recordings fair and prevent unfair rejoining. When a player dies, they are automatically kicked with a custom message. Perfect for **recording events, tournaments, SMPs, and content creators**.

---

## ✨ Features

* ✅ Automatically kicks players on death
* ✅ Custom kick message support
* ✅ Lightweight and server-friendly
* ✅ Helps keep recording sessions fair and organized
* ✅ Works seamlessly with SMPs, minigames, and events

---

## 📜 Example Message

```text
You died during a recording. DO NOT JOIN BACK until told to.
```

The message appears when the player is kicked, ensuring everyone knows the rules.

---

## ⚠️ Usage Guidelines

* Use this mod to maintain fairness in recorded events.
* Players **should not rejoin** until instructed by the server admin.
* Ideal for content creators, SMPs, or competitive events.

---

## 💡 Why Kick on Death?

This mod prevents unfair advantages during recordings by ensuring players **cannot immediately respawn after death**, keeping events organized and fair for all participants.

---

## 🔧 Compatibility

* Works on multiplayer servers
* Lightweight and stable
* Easy to integrate into any existing server setup

---

## ⭐ Support

If you enjoy the mod:

* ⭐ Follow the project
* ⭐ Leave feedback
* ⭐ Report issues or suggest improvements
